description: A composite card built around an inset close-up portrait of a man (identified in the tweet as alleged MS-13 gang member Carlos Rivera-Alvarado of El Salvador). The inset is a tightly cropped frontal photo of a man with short dark hair and light stubble, wearing a dark gray-green Philadelphia Eagles t-shirt (the team's bird logo and 'EAGLES' wordmark are visible), shot against a plain pale interior wall. This portrait is layered over a background photo of a residential and commercial street scene: a low pale building, a wide empty street, sidewalk, parked cars, telephone and utility poles and lines, and trees under a clear blue sky. The tweet states the location is Vineland, N.J. No agency seal or on-image headline text is present in this version; the only text is the 'EAGLES' branding on the subject's shirt.
notable_text: (no designed headline; subject wears a Philadelphia 'EAGLES' t-shirt)
